title: Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada

heroImage.alt: Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada, Odisha

overview.short: Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ହରି ବଳଦେବ ଜୀଉ ବିଜେ) is a Hindu temple of lord Jagannath located in Baripada, Mayurbhanj district, in the state of Odisha, India.
overview.description: Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije (Odia: ଶ୍ରୀ ଶ୍ରୀ ହରି ବଳଦେବ ଜୀଉ ବିଜେ) is a Hindu temple of lord Jagannath located in Baripada, Mayurbhanj district, in the state of Odisha, India. The name Jagannath (Lord of the Universe) is a combination of the Sanskrit words Jagat (Universe) and Nath (Lord of). The District of Mayurbhanj preserves many temples built in different styles of Orissan architecture, such as Rekha, Bhadra and Gauriya. Among the Rekha temples the most important are the temples of Kakharua Baidyanath at Manatri of this district and that of Lord Jagannath at Baripada.

topPlaces.name: Mayurbhanj Palace
topPlaces.description: Mayurbhanj Palace was the royal palace of Maharajas of Mayurbhanj, which was a princely state in British Raj. It is a heritage architectural monument and landmark of Baripada town, which was the erstwhile capital of the Mayurbhanj State.

topPlaces.name: Mayurbhanj State
topPlaces.description: Mayurbhanj State (Odia: ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ରାଜ୍ୟ; colloquially Morbhanj) was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj. It was one of the largest states of the Eastern States Agency and one of the four salute states of the Orissa States Agency.

topPlaces.name: Baripada
topPlaces.description: Baripada (bāripadā) is a city and a municipality in Mayurbhanj district in the state of Odisha, India. Located along the east bank of the Budhabalanga river, Baripada is the cultural centre of north Odisha.

topPlaces.name: Belgadia Palace
topPlaces.description: The Belgadia Palace is an 18th-century Victorian-era styled hill-top palace located in Mayurbhanj district, Odisha, India.

items.note: Mayurbhanj Palace was the royal palace of Maharajas of Mayurbhanj, which was a princely state in British Raj. It is a heritage architectural monument and landmark of Baripada town, which was the erstwhile capital of the Mayurbhanj State.

Mayurbhanj State (Odia: ମୟୂରଭଞ୍ଜ ରାଜ୍ୟ; colloquially Morbhanj) was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj. It was one of the largest states of the Eastern States Agency and one of the four salute states of the Orissa States Agency.

Baripada (bāripadā) is a city and a municipality in Mayurbhanj district in the state of Odisha, India. Located along the east bank of the Budhabalanga river, Baripada is the cultural centre of north Odisha.
The Belgadia Palace is an 18th-century Victorian-era styled hill-top palace located in Mayurbhanj district, Odisha, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (195 km) and the nearest railway station is Jamshedpur (Tatanagar) (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Shri Hari Baladev Jew Bije, Baripada?
faq.a: The top attractions are Mayurbhanj Palace, Mayurbhanj State, Baripada, Belgadia Palace.
